hero.lede: QM — an Armenian manufacturer of high-precision machine tools and industrial solutions for modern production. We develop and deploy equipment for businesses across Armenia and export our products to international markets.

solutions.title: CORE SOLUTIONS
solutions.description: Built for performance. Built for reliability. Built for the future of manufacturing.

cards.title: CNC precision machining center
cards.description: Advanced computer numerical control for high-precision production. Ideal for complex parts with exceptional accuracy and repeatability.

cards.title: Industrial robotic system
cards.description: Fully automated robotics for assembly, welding, and material handling. Boosts throughput while maintaining consistent quality standards.

cards.title: Laser cutting and engraving system
cards.description: Modern fiber laser technology for cutting and engraving diverse materials. Ideal for precision metalwork and custom fabrication.

about.title: About the company — industrial
paragraphs: QM is an Armenian manufacturing company founded in 1998 in Hrazdan. We specialize in industrial equipment and machine tools in Armenia, combining engineering expertise, high precision, and modern technology.

Our production structure covers the full metalworking cycle: blanking, foundry, turning, milling, jig boring, grinding, heat treatment, and gear cutting, plus modern CNC equipment. This approach ensures stable quality of industrial products and control at every production stage.

advantages.title: QUALITECH ADVANTAGES
advantages.description: Machine tool manufacturing in Armenia with full-cycle metalworking.

cards.title: FULL-CYCLE METALWORKING

cards.title: MODERN INDUSTRIAL EQUIPMENT
cards.description: More than 200 units of equipment for precision metal processing and industrial machine tool manufacturing.

cards.title: MACHINE TOOL PRODUCTION SINCE 1998
